settings.title: BGI Nexus
settings.tagline: A global community building beneficial AI and AGI through working groups, hackathons, and collective action.

items.what: events, working groups, and open Q&A

hero.lead: BGI Nexus is a community platform to support the development of beneficial AI and AGI that serves all of humanity — through working groups, hackathons, and community-led action!

about.title: Coordination, community,
about.body: BGI Nexus provides community-driven funding and infrastructure for building beneficial AI that serves humanity and our planet.
about.body_soft: The initiative connects builders with resources, expertise, and a wider community so promising beneficial AI ideas can move from proposal to real-world impact.
about.body_2: The path to beneficial AGI runs through people with diverse experience and expertise working in the same direction: technical builders, governance thinkers, domain specialists, and communities with real stakes in the outcome. BGI Nexus creates the space and structure for that collaboration to take root and move fast, through working groups, hands-on hypersprints, and an active global community.

principles.body: Ongoing coordination around technical, sociotechnical, and governance questions. Open to contributors at every level.
Time-bounded collaborative builds for our cutting edge AGI tech stack. Technical and non-technical submissions welcome!
Open channels, events, and peer support for builders, thinkers, and researchers.

working_groups.intro: The BGI Nexus working groups are built for people who want to move from conversation to coordinated action, bringing contributors together around practical topics for guiding and governing AGI toward beneficial outcomes.

events.intro: Monthly community updates, grant progress, open Q&A, and working-group sessions for people building beneficial AI.

quote.side_body: Community-driven funding and infrastructure for building beneficial AI that serves humanity and our planet.

projects.intro: BGI Nexus supports builders creating beneficial AI projects with real-world impact across health, climate resilience, accessibility, governance, agriculture, and ecological knowledge.

contact.title: Stay
contact.body: Get updates on funded projects, grant rounds, and community events, or contact the BGI Nexus team directly.

what.label: 01 · General information
what.title: What is BGI?
what.body: BGI Nexus is where beneficial AI gets built.
what.body_soft: We connect bold ideas with the expertise and community needed to turn them into real-world impact. As a global, community-driven initiative, BGI Nexus supports the development of beneficial AI and AGI through collaborative building and transparent governance so that the power of AI can serve humanity, the biosphere, and future generations.

principles.label: 02 · Our principles
principles.title: Principles of BGI
principles.body: At BGI Nexus, we believe AI should be developed in the service of flourishing life. That means building technologies guided by purpose, openness, human agency, fairness, and shared responsibility. Our principles encourage a shift away from extractive, short-term thinking and toward systems that are regenerative, inclusive, and designed to strengthen people, communities, and the living world.

items.body: Projects are selected for practical benefit to people, communities, and public-good systems.
Several teams focus on climate resilience, biodiversity, carbon trust, and regenerative ecological knowledge.
The cohort includes language access, inclusive conferencing, and sign-language translation for underserved communities.
Projects explore community agency, open health data, and democratic decision-making tools.
BGI Nexus emphasizes moving from proposals and discussion into funded, measurable work.

spiral.label: 03 · Spiral of Flourishing
spiral.title: Spiral of Flourishing
spiral.body: The Spiral of Flourishing expresses our vision for human-AI symbiosis. It offers a living framework for shaping AI in ways that preserve wonder, deepen connection, strengthen resilience, and open new possibilities for meaning and creativity.
spiral.body_soft: By linking values with design, it helps guide the development of technologies that do not replace what is most valuable in human experience, but become a faithful ally to it.

cta.title: Questions or want
cta.body: Get updates on funded projects, grant rounds, and community events, or contact the team directly.

hero.headline: From conversation
hero.lead: The BGI Nexus working groups are built for people who want to move from conversation to coordinated action around practical topics for beneficial AGI.

join.label: ※ What to expect
join.title: The kickoff opens
join.body: The kickoff session introduces initial working-group topics, connects contributors with one another, and sets the next phase of collaboration for the BGI Nexus community.

steps.title: Meet the community
steps.body: Connect with other members of the BGI Nexus community and learn where people are already contributing.

steps.title: Explore themes
steps.body: Discuss AGI for human flourishing, consciousness, and proactionary versus precautionary approaches to AGI.

steps.title: Find collaborators
steps.body: Match interests, skills, and questions with contributors who want to keep building after the session.

steps.title: Shape the next phase
steps.body: Help shape ongoing collaboration and quarterly meetups around the topics that gather momentum.

sprints.title: Quarterly
sprints.body: Each topic is intended to expand into ongoing collaboration and quarterly meetups, giving the community a recurring rhythm for practical work.
sprints.body_soft: The kickoff session marks the beginning of a series of collaborative working groups focused on guiding and governing AGI toward beneficial outcomes for humanity.

hero.headline: Funded beneficial AI
hero.lead: BGI Nexus funded ten projects building beneficial AI across health, climate, accessibility, governance, agriculture, and ecological knowledge.

round.label: ※ Round 01 · 2024
round.title: Community-selected
round.body: The BGI Nexus community came together to fund the first wave of beneficial AI projects, deploying support to ten teams working on practical public-good applications.
round.body_soft: From social and environmental solutions to safer and more compassionate AI systems, each project contributes to a more democratic ecosystem of innovation that benefits people, societies, and the biosphere.

funding.title: Community-driven.
funding.body: Get updates on funded projects, grant rounds, and community events through the BGI Nexus newsletter and public channels.

data.title: Healthy Human-AI Ecosystems
data.body: AI and agents for the workplace and DAOs that augment collaborative workflows. We are inviting builders, researchers and community members to explore the integration of AI agents into the systems humans use to collaborate and build together.

data.title: BGI Nexus Working Groups - The Kickoff Session
data.body: Join us for the first working-group meetup in the BGI Nexus community. This kickoff session launches a series of practical, collaborative working groups focused on guiding and governing AGI toward beneficial outcomes for humanity.

data.name: AGI for Human Flourishing / Nurturing & Governing AGI
data.summary: A working group topic focused on guiding and governing AGI toward beneficial outcomes for humanity.

data.name: The Consciousness Revolution
data.summary: A working group topic for exploring consciousness, human meaning, and the role of AGI in supporting flourishing life.

data.name: Proactionary vs Precautionary Approaches to AGI
data.summary: A working group topic for comparing proactionary and precautionary approaches to AGI development, risk, and governance.

data.title: Productivity EEG-AI Agents
data.summary: Brain-signal-powered productivity system using EEG data and AI for cognitive enhancement.
data.impact: Achieved 15% average productivity improvement in 200+ users through EEG-AI integration.

data.title: Acropolis OS - Autonomous Community AGI
data.summary: Operating system using AGI for democratic decision-making in autonomous communities.
data.impact: Supporting governance for 8 autonomous communities with AI-driven decision tools.

data.title: NigerGuard: AI Climate Resilience-Vulnerable States
data.summary: AI-powered climate resilience platform for vulnerable regions with early warning systems.
data.impact: Protecting 250,000+ people across vulnerable regions with early warning systems.

data.title: AURORA: Decentralised AI for Carbon Credit Trust
data.summary: Decentralized AI platform bringing transparency to carbon credit markets through automated verification.
data.impact: Verified $2.3M in carbon credits with 99.2% accuracy using AI validation.

data.title: GlucoseDAO
data.summary: Open health platform democratizing glucose data ownership while advancing diabetes research.
data.impact: 1,200+ users contributing anonymized glucose data for diabetes research.

data.title: BIONEXUS GAIA: AI for Regenerative Biodiversity
data.summary: Advanced AI system for biodiversity regeneration and ecosystem recovery monitoring.
data.impact: Monitoring 50+ restoration sites across 8 countries with AI-driven insights.

data.title: Project Lovelock - Living Libraries Network
data.summary: Decentralized ecological knowledge repositories preserving indigenous wisdom and scientific biodiversity data.
data.impact: Preserving knowledge from 30+ indigenous communities and creating biodiversity databases.

data.title: Sign Language Translator AI (SLTA)
data.summary: AI-powered sign language translation system bridging communication gaps through real-time visual recognition.
data.impact: Achieved 95% accuracy rate across 15 sign language variants, serving deaf communities globally.

data.title: Think Inclusion Conferencing App
data.summary: Inclusive design conferencing platform ensuring global events are accessible to people with disabilities.
data.impact: Hosted 25+ accessible events reaching 10,000+ participants worldwide.

data.title: Farmlingua
data.summary: Multilingual AI platform for smallholder farmers, breaking down language barriers in agricultural knowledge sharing.
data.impact: Supporting 500+ smallholder farmers across 12 countries with localized agricultural guidance.

data.question: How do I stay connected?
data.answer: Subscribe to get updates on funded projects, grant rounds, and community events.

data.question: How do I get in touch?
data.answer: Email bginexus@singularitynet.io with questions or to get involved.

data.question: Where can I follow BGI Nexus?
data.answer: BGI Nexus is on Discord, Telegram, and LinkedIn through the public community links listed on this page.

data.question: Is BGI Nexus part of SingularityNET?
data.answer: Yes. The public site describes BGI Nexus as part of the SingularityNET ecosystem.

data.question: Where can I learn about funded projects?
data.answer: The sponsored projects page lists the funded BGI Nexus cohort and links to each project site.
